messages.content: 翻译为英文：请开启蓝牙
please turn on bluetooth
translate to chinese: please save your work
请保存你的工作
translate to chinese: please scan the qr code
请扫描二维码
translate to chinese: this feature is not yet available
这个功能还没有上线
翻译为英文：这台电脑很卡
this computer is very slow

this feature is not yet available
翻译为英文：这个文件太大了
this file is too big
translate to chinese: wrong password please try again
密码错误请重试
translate to chinese: need to restart the device
需要重启设备
翻译为英文：你需要更新软件
you need to update the software
